scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: every documented endpoint on https://chargedesk.com/api-docs (fetched and parsed directly; Charges, Customers, Subscriptions, Products, Webhooks, Agents, Logs, and the live Gateway Methods) is now either a stream, a writes.json action, or excluded with a specific reason.

excluded.reason: creates a plain (non-gateway) charge RECORD only, distinct from the live gateway charge-creation method; a narrow secondary create path with no corresponding read-side distinction from the gateway-created shape, deferred pending real demand
single-charge detail is a strict subset of the charges list stream's fields

per-charge line-item/tax breakdown; a fan_out over the charges stream is possible in principle but line items carry no independent identity/cursor of their own and are low value versus the already-covered charge-level totals, deferred pending real demand
sends a receipt/notification email for an existing charge; a narrow notification-trigger action distinct from ordinary data mutation, deferred pending real demand
a stateless tax/total calculator for a hypothetical charge amount; returns a computed preview with no primary key, not enumerable record data
single-customer detail is a strict subset of the customers list stream's fields

an identity-search lookup (by customer id/email/username/name/phone or free-text query) that returns a structured billing history for ONE matched customer, not a list of records with an independent primary key of its own to project as a stream
creates a RECORD of an external subscription (explicitly documented as not a gateway method, so it does not create a live subscription); a narrow secondary create path, deferred pending real demand
single-subscription detail is a strict subset of the subscriptions list stream's fields

updates a subscription record's stored data (status/amount/interval/customer_id/metadata) without going through the live gateway; distinct from the gateway cancel_subscription write already covered, deferred pending real demand

creates a product catalog record; this connector's write surface is scoped to customer/charge/agent/webhook lifecycle and live gateway mutations, not product-catalog management, deferred pending real demand
single-product detail is a strict subset of the products list stream's fields
updates a product catalog record; same product-catalog-management scope narrowing as create_product

the live gateway charge-creation method (charges a customer's card on the connected gateway); a materially higher-risk mutation than the record-level create_customer/update_charge writes this connector already covers, deferred pending real demand for direct card-charging capability from a sync connector
the live gateway subscription plan-change method (upgrade/downgrade a subscription's plan on the connected gateway); a materially higher-risk billing-plan mutation, deferred pending real demand
